notes: Primary identity provider; quarterly access review runs against Okta groups + privileged-access roles. Evidence emits via Okta API.

scope_rationale: Legacy AS/400 payroll system is being decommissioned by 2026-12-31. Compensating control: monthly manual access review by HR head (EXC-2026-0002 documents the time-bounded waiver).

notes: EU-resident customer data lives in eu-central R2 bucket + Hyperdrive read-replica. Tested via residency-conformance suite.
